rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF STEFAN SPERLING
rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: off calendar. the order for final distribution was ordered on January 2, 2018. No further reports on status are required, nor should any be filed, as the personal representative does not need court approval to time to distribute the reserve. in addition, this court does not track estates once the order for final distribution is filed and it does not track the filing of ex parte petitions for final discharge.
